zh.Sanquhar, Dumfries, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar於1330年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，她的父親Sir Robert Erskine25歲，母親Mrs. Robert Erskine22歲。她於大約1348年與Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar于1330年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，她的父亲Sir Robert Erskine25岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Erskine22岁。她于大约1348年与Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1424年享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kerr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived by a marsh or swampy woodland, Middle English kerr ‘brushwood, wet ground’ (Old Norse kjarr). A legend grew up that the Kerrs were left-handed, on theory that the name is derived from Gaelic cearr ‘wrong-handed, left-handed’.
Irish: variant of   Carr  .
Americanized form of German   Kehr   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Carr
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Carra ‘descendant of Carra’, a personal name from the adjective corr ‘pointed’, explained as meaning ‘spear’. As an Ulster surname, Carr was often confused with Scottish Kerr .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Mac Giolla Chathair, a Donegal name meaning ‘son of Giolla Cathair’ or ‘the servant (i.e. devotee) of Saint Cathar’. Cathar was a priest and bishop, otherwise unknown.
Irish: in Galway, a shortened Anglicized form of Mac Giolla Chéire, see Keary .

variants.name: Caris
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from any of several places called Carr House or Carrhouse (examples of which are found in northern counties including Cheshire and Yorkshire), from Middle English kerr ‘wet ground’ or ‘brushwood’ (Old Norse kjarr; see Kerr ) + h(o)us ‘house’ (Old English hūs).
Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Macarius, from Greek Makarios ‘blessed’, a Christian saint's name.
Americanized form of German   Karis  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Polish: variant of   Lada  .
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Grzegorz, Irena, Lucyna, Witold.

Polish (mainly Łada) and Czech (Moravian): from a short form of the Polish personal name Ładysław, Czech Ladislav, both from Vladislav (Latinized as Ladislaus), a Slavic name composed of the elements vlad ‘to rule’ (from Old Slavic vlasti, later vladati) + slav ‘glory’ or ‘famous’ (from slava ‘glory’). Compare 2 below.
Hungarian: from Lad(a), a short form of the personal name Ladomér, a Hungarian form of Slavic Vladimir (see Lado 2, compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar was born in 1330, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Erskine, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Erskine, was 22. She married Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar about 1348, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1424, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar est née en 1330, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Erskine, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Erskine, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar environ 1348, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1424, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar 1330 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Erskine 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert Erskine 22. Sie hat um 1348 in Scotland Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1424 im Alter von 94 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar è nata il nel 1330 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Erskine, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Robert Erskine, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar circa 1348, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1424, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquharが1330年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Erskineは25歳，母Mrs. Robert Erskineは22歳であった。約1348年にスコットランドでEdward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1424年に94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar(이)가 1330년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Erskine(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Erskine(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1348년 스컷랜드에서 Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar nasceu em 1330, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Erskine, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert Erskine, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar aproximadamente 1348, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1424, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar родилась в 1330 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Erskine было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Erskine, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar около 1348 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1424 г. в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar nació en 1330, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Erskine, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert Erskine, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar aproximadamente 1348, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1424, a la edad de 94 años.
